author: James Watkins
body: Chen Wei confirmed Q2 budget approved for Claude expansion into fixed income research. Wants roadmap presentation before end of April.

author: James Watkins
body: David Ng raised concerns about model explainability for ASIC reporting. Need to schedule technical deep-dive with our safety team.

author: James Watkins
body: Anna Liu shared that CDAO Dr. Norton is now an internal champion after seeing the fraud detection demo results. Get exec briefing scheduled.

author: James Watkins
body: Microsoft escalated with dedicated Azure OpenAI team at CBA. Norton met with Microsoft CTO in person. Need to accelerate our proof-of-concept timeline.

author: Rachel Kim
body: Ben Wu confirmed they are 6 weeks into internal AI pilot for contact center deflection. Pilot showing 28% deflection rate — below their 40% target. Opportunity to show Claude's superiority.

author: James Watkins
body: Google expanded Telstra Vertex AI contract to include contact center analytics. Linda Park expressed frustration with Google's response times. Keep tracking.

author: Wei Lin
body: Raj Menon proactively requested Anthropic executive briefing at CEO level. Piyush Gupta is interested in Claude for institutional banking. Escalate to Dario.

author: Wei Lin
body: DBS expanded Claude usage to 1,200 active internal users across wealth management. Usage growing 23% MoM. Upsell conversation underway.

author: Wei Lin
body: Ming Chen flagged that GrabAI internal team is experimenting with open-source Llama for cost reduction on lower-stakes use cases. Need to defend premium with outcomes data.

author: Ji-Young Park
body: Choi Jun-seo confirmed executive AI steering committee approved Claude pilot for R&D documentation search. 90-day POC starts May 1.

author: Ji-Young Park
body: Park Soo-jin (VP R&D) is the key IP blocker. She needs formal IP protection addendum before any contract. Legal to draft within 2 weeks.

author: Ji-Young Park
body: Lee Seon-woo shared KakaoWork enterprise renewal data: 18% churn rate in enterprise accounts. Our Claude integration could be positioned as retention play.

author: Kenji Nakamura
body: Yuki Tanaka flagged OpenAI contract with SoftBank includes exclusivity clause for internal use cases. Our play is portfolio companies (ARM, T-Mobile). Explore via SoftBank Vision Fund relationship.

author: Kenji Nakamura
body: Hiroshi Yamamoto confirmed Toyota is evaluating 3 vendors for engineering documentation AI. Microsoft Azure OpenAI, Google, and us. Decision expected Q3.

author: Kenji Nakamura
body: New CDO Keiko Sato arriving from McKinsey is known to favor non-Microsoft AI vendors. Get intro through McKinsey Tokyo partner connection before she settles in.

author: Arjun Mehta
body: Nandan Rao confirmed Infosys is about to announce an AI platform partnership — they're deciding between us and Azure OpenAI. Decision this quarter. CEO-level call needed.

author: Arjun Mehta
body: Deepa Krishna flagged that Microsoft offered Infosys a revenue-share deal on Copilot Studio reselling worth $15M. We need to counter with similar economics.

author: Adi Santoso
body: Budi Santoso signed Google Vertex AI for digital banking analytics. Re-engage Q3 when Google pilot results due — Budi privately noted limitations in Bahasa Indonesia quality.

author: Adi Santoso
body: Eko Prasetyo interested in sovereign AI positioning. Raised Telkom's obligation as a BUMN to use government-approved AI vendors. Check BPDP (govt AI registry) requirements.

author: Rachel Kim
body: James O'Connor confirmed Woodside board approved digital AI budget of AU$45M for FY26. No incumbent vendor locked in. Need proposal by end of May before budget allocated.

author: Rachel Kim
body: Sophie White confirmed ANZ Group AU Macquarie relationship opened the door. She's ready to run a joint pilot aligned to ANZ Group agreement. Fast-track paperwork.

author: Rachel Kim
body: Priya Sharma flagged OpenAI GPT-4o is being evaluated for Rovo v2 code generation. Our current integration is in jira/confluence text. Need to expand to code use cases before v2 decision.
